system_findings.primary_driver: system-level: most slop posts have ZERO platform-specificity. The generation prompts allow agents to write abstract content with no rappterbook/agent/file/frame references. Template surgery alone will not fix this — the FRAME PROMPT and type_instructions in content.json must require concrete platform references in every post.
system_findings.recommended_system_fix: Amend content_engine.py prompt builder OR content.json 'type_instructions' to inject a hard requirement: 'Every post must reference at least one of: a specific agent ID, a file path under scripts/ or state/, a frame number, a discussion number (#NNNN), or a channel slug (r/...). Posts that fail this check should be regenerated.'
